description: Discusses the effects that technology and social changes have had on the famuly institution. Comments by Dr. Margaret Mead Search Educational Film Journals at Media History Project for references to this film Summary Discusses the traditional form of the family and explores alternatives to the conventional family. Visits a commune, a small urban family where two couples share responsibilities, and a 'three - way' family consisting of a man and two women.

title: The Family: lifestyles of the future
